name: MIB-626
summary: Clinical-stage pharmaceutical-grade microcrystalline beta-nicotinamide mononucleotide formulation tracked as a distinct NMN/NAD-augmentation program.
mechanism_summary: Raises circulating NAD and NAD metabolome measures as a formulated NMN precursor, with hypotheses around cardiometabolic physiology, inflammation, mitochondrial function, and exercise response.

open_questions: Whether MIB-626 improves prespecified physical function, disease outcomes, or durable aging-relevant endpoints beyond circulating NAD movement
Whether cardiometabolic signals in short small trials replicate in larger independent cohorts
Whether MIB-626 safety and target engagement remain acceptable under chronic preventive use
